reference_source.scenario_file: HemorrhageClass2Saline (also informed by HemorrhageClass1Femoral and HemorrhageClass2Blood)
reference_source.extraction_method: published-text (validation tables from Pulse methodology pages)
reference_source.notes: Pulse publishes per-segment validation values rather than dense timepoint series. We map Pulse's Segment 1 (acute Class-2 hemorrhage, 140 mL/min for 590s) and Segment 3 (after 500 mL saline IV at 100 mL/min) onto our scenario's deterioration peak (t~350) and post-bolus recovery (t~500). Our scenario is a stronger hemorrhage (severity 0.5 then 0.75 with two 1L crystalloid boluses) so divergence is informative. Temperature and SpO2 from Pulse Class-1 Femoral baseline (37.1 C, 97.0 percent) — Pulse Class-2 Saline reports 37.2 C and 96.5 percent at hemorrhage peak. Pulse models healthy baseline patient at HR 72 bpm; we use a clinically typical 76 bpm baseline.
